expected_curve: I2S-hurts gap monotone increasing in ATTRACT_BYTES

acceptance.rule: value_profile ≈ value_profile_cmplog at ATTRACT_BYTES=1 (no attractor: 255/256 of inputs trip the trap for both); value_profile > value_profile_cmplog at ATTRACT_BYTES=4; value_profile >> value_profile_cmplog (vpc near 0) at ATTRACT_BYTES=8 — the wide literal lets I2S re-paste the whole window and 'fix' the deviating byte back, while the I2S-lacking arm keeps it random

design_basis: ATTRACT_BYTES = width of the contiguous valid-form literal I2S observes via per-position equality CMPs and re-substitutes. Wider literal => stronger one-way attractor toward the all-matching state => I2S re-pastes the final byte more aggressively, suppressing the single deviation the trap needs; the I2S-lacking arm (value_profile) keeps random diversity at the deviating position. The I2S-hurts gap therefore grows with the knob.
notes: ATTRACT_BYTES=1: no anchor chain (loop #if-compiled out); trap fires on any input whose byte 0 != literal (255/256). No literal for I2S to re-paste at the trap position => no attractor; vp ≈ vpc, both crash readily.
ATTRACT_BYTES=2: 1-byte anchor + 1 deviation byte. Mild attractor; I2S begins re-pasting the 2nd byte to match; vp slightly ahead of vpc.
ATTRACT_BYTES=4: 3-byte anchor; I2S re-substitutes the 4-byte window, frequently 'repairing' the deviating final byte; vp clearly > vpc.
ATTRACT_BYTES=8: 7-byte anchor; the wide literal is re-pasted whole, so any deviating final byte is repeatedly fixed back; vpc near 0 while vp (no I2S) keeps the deviation and crashes.

HONESTY CAVEAT: this is a single-input micro-harness; the real divergence is a CORPUS-pollution dynamic that needs many seeds and scheduler interaction to manifest. A clean micro-harness may show no separation (the per-exec I2S substitution alone may not dominate havoc's diversity) -> an inconclusive verdict is an honest outcome, not a failure.
